title: The sadness of an empty room
content:
The sadness of an empty room

husband and wife eat their baby every 9 months
they look forward to it
stepford wives
biological chemical necessity
one true love -- otherwise artificial insemination
couple isnt happy, not revealed until half way through
beginning starts with press junket and media


only 1 penis can fit into one vagina


artists lie in service of the truth

throwing myself over the railing
suicide at an early age
context: From document: The sadness of an empty room
